title: bupleurum regelii
intro: Bupleurum regelii, also known as Regal Bupleurum or Chinese Thorowax, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum regelii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver function, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and hepatitis. Bupleurum regelii is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
